abilities.name: 통찰
abilities.description: 상대가 지닌 물건을 알 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.
Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.
